name: Snakey: Hunters Arena
description: Advanced snake game with power-ups, abilities, hunters, and progressive levels. Collect food, avoid obstacles, and survive as long as you can! LEVEL PROGRESSION Level 0-4: Basic gameplay, increasing speed Level 5+: Obstacles appear (rocks, spikes, portals) Level 10+: Armed hunters start appearing and shooting bullets Every 30 seconds: Level increases, more obstacles and hunters spawn
instructions: Desktop Arrow Keys - Move snake uarr darr larr rarr Hold Arrow Keys - Speed boost 60 faster Mobile Touch Swipe - Move snake in desired direction Hold Swipe - Speed boost
